basic_details.job_title: TISS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released on 29 April 2026 on the official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the TISS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with 55% marks in Social Sciences / Social Work / Related fields, NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D.
qualification.details: Assistant Professor: A Master's degree with 55% marks (or an equivalent grade in a point-scale wherever the grading system is followed) in Social Sciences / Social Work / Related fields from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign university. Besides fulfilling the above qualifications, Eligibility (A or B): A. NET/SLET/SET qualified or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2009/2016 or Ph.D. from top 500 foreign university. Desirable: Ph.D. in Social Sciences / Social Work, teaching experience in skill programmes.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TISS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TISS Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the TISS Assistant Professor positions is 15th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Assistant Professor position in the Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) recruitment drive for 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Professor role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree with 55% marks in Social Sciences, Social Work, or related fields. Additionally, they must be NET/SLET/SET qualified or hold a Ph.D. as per UGC norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for TISS Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 1000/- for General/OBC candidates and Rs. 250/- for SC/ST candidates. Women candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary for the Assistant Professor post ranges from Rs. 89,435/- to Rs. 1,00,595/- per month, depending on experience and qualifications.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Assistant Professor positions at TISS will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify a minimum or maximum age limit for the Assistant Professor positions. Candidates are advised to check the detailed advertisement for any specific age criteria.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Maharashtra apply for this post?
faq.answer: The notification mentions that applications are invited from eligible candidates in Maharashtra. However, it is advisable to check the official notification for any specific domicile requirements.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the TISS Assistant Professor job?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply online through the official website of TISS or via the direct application link provided in the 'Important Links' section before the last date of 15th May 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly.
